text: The letters A, B and C on the portable fire extinguisher represent what?

options.text: A) How much chemical it holds
B) The first 3 letters of the extinguisher
C) Type of fire on which it can be used

explanation: The letters A, B, and C on portable fire extinguishers indicate the class of fire on which they are suitable for use. Class A is for ordinary combustibles, Class B for flammable liquids, and Class C for energized electrical fires.
